footer.brandBlurb: Guided enduro routes from Álora, Málaga. Multi-day packages with bike and accommodation included.

home.title: Ride the wild heart of Andalucía
home.subtitle: Multi-day guided enduro routes through Málaga's most varied terrain — bike, accommodation and local knowledge included.

packages.title: Two ways to ride
packages.note: Adventure bike options available on route days. We also advise you personally and prepare an individual offer for you.

findUs.title: Based in Álora, Málaga
findUs.text: 20 minutes from Málaga airport, at the edge of some of the province's best enduro terrain.
